description: Three-layer deterministic control system for all AI models on this machine

architecture.philosophy: Never use Layer 3 for something Layer 2 can do. Never use Layer 2 for something Layer 1 should control.

responsibilities: Session lifecycle (start, stop, restart, context reset)
Phase transitions via hooks and validation scripts

layer_2_guards.nature: Bash scripts, no LLM, binary pass/fail
responsibilities: Phase validation (file existence, required sections, line counts)
Test execution (test suite, linting, type checking)

layer_3_agents.nature: LLM, within constraints set by Layers 1-2

agents.generator: TDD implementation, can only move to IMPLEMENTED
agents.evaluator: Independent grading with tools, tuned for scepticism

transitions.REQUESTED -> CONTRACT_LOCKED: Planner creates task.contract.json, harness validates and locks
transitions.CONTRACT_LOCKED -> IMPLEMENTED: Generator completes work, all self-tests pass
transitions.IMPLEMENTED -> VERIFIED: Independent verifier passes 7-layer protocol with evidence
transitions.ANY_ACTIVE -> STUCK: 3 same errors, 5min no progress, env error, confusion

rules: States cannot be skipped — harness enforces
Builder can ONLY move to IMPLEMENTED
Done is COMPUTED from evidence, not typed

harness_phases.PLAN: Planner expands brief to high-level spec. Human gate.
harness_phases.NEGOTIATE: Generator proposes, evaluator reviews sprint contract. Max 3 attempts.
harness_phases.BUILD: Generator implements per contract. Loop detection active. TDD-first.
harness_phases.EVALUATE: Layer 2 compliance first, then evaluator agent with tools. Max 3 attempts.
harness_phases.COMPLETE: Handoff written, human notified for sign-off.

global.applies_to: Every Claude Code session on this machine

memory_equipped.contains: core/, working/, episodic/, procedural/, semantic/, meta/, prospective/
memory_equipped.note: operating-procedure.md contains the full enhanced harness

soft_enforcement.what: Instructions in markdown that the LLM reads and hopefully follows
soft_enforcement.reliability: Works when context fresh, degrades under pressure

hard_enforcement.what: Bash scripts, Claude Code hooks, harness logic running outside LLM

harness_enforcement.what: Outer loop controlling what agent sees and whether it can proceed
harness_enforcement.reliability: Agent doesn't participate in these decisions

developer_additions.name: Context Anxiety
developer_additions.fix: Clean context resets at phase boundaries (distinct from saturation)

developer_additions.name: Self-Evaluation Bias
developer_additions.fix: Structurally separate evaluator with own context

developer_additions.name: Compaction vs Clean Reset
developer_additions.fix: Rich handoff artifacts at sprint boundaries

developer_additions.name: Speculative Planning Cascades
developer_additions.fix: Planner stays high-level, no implementation detail

developer_additions.name: Phantom TDD
developer_additions.fix: Three-layer: evidence collector (Bash hook), TDD cycle validator (red→green gate), harness-executed tests (independent backstop). Agent never self-reports test results.

layers.name: Evidence Before Verdict
layers.rule: Verifier NEVER reads builder's code or claims

layers.name: Adversarial Framing
layers.rule: Your job is to FIND PROBLEMS

layers.name: Calibration Gate
layers.rule: Plant failure, verify caught, then trust results

protocol_fidelity_mechanisms.inline_checkpoints: Mandatory file-writing operations at defined intervals force re-reading protocol
protocol_fidelity_mechanisms.negative_loop_detector: Deterministic script (git + test analysis) that BLOCKS, not advises
protocol_fidelity_mechanisms.known_fixes_registry: Symptom-matched fixes injected by scripts, not searched by agents
protocol_fidelity_mechanisms.protocol_re_injection: Break skills into phase chunks, load only current phase at transitions
protocol_fidelity_mechanisms.evaluator_compliance_check: Protocol fidelity is hard gate — sprint fails regardless of code quality
protocol_fidelity_mechanisms.tdd_execution_evidence_gate: Three-layer TDD enforcement: Bash hook collects evidence, validate-tdd.sh checks red→green cycle, harness independently runs tests at BUILD→EVALUATE gate

production_hardening.no_eval: Structured verification format (file_exists, file_contains, test_passes) — NEVER eval on markdown
production_hardening.retry_limits: Contract negotiation max 3, evaluation max 3, Claude session max 3
production_hardening.prompts_via_file: Stdin piping, not command-line arguments (avoids shell length limits)
production_hardening.scoped_hooks: PostToolUse fires on Write/Edit (compliance checks) and Bash (TDD evidence collection during BUILD phase) — not every tool use
production_hardening.crash_recovery: startup-recovery.sh cleans stale artifacts, kills orphans, writes fresh handoff
production_hardening.concurrency: Lockfile with PID check, stale lock detection
production_hardening.budget_breaker: Time + cost limits with state save on exit
production_hardening.telegram_watchdog: Heartbeat monitoring, auto-restart if daemon dies
